mapper.insert: insert into fin_quote_snapshot( asset_id, asset_code, asset_name, snapshot_date, quote_time, provider_code, last_price, open_price, prev_close_price, change_amount, change_rate, raw_payload, create_time ) values ( #{assetId}, #{assetCode}, #{assetName}, #{snapshotDate}, #{quoteTime}, #{providerCode}, #{lastPrice}, #{openPrice}, #{prevClosePrice}, #{changeAmount}, #{changeRate}, #{rawPayload}, sysdate() )
mapper.select: select q.quote_id, q.asset_id, a.asset_code, a.asset_name, q.snapshot_date, q.quote_time, q.provider_code, q.last_price, q.open_price, q.prev_close_price, q.change_amount, q.change_rate, q.raw_payload from fin_quote_snapshot q inner join ( select asset_id, max(quote_time) as max_quote_time from fin_quote_snapshot group by asset_id ) x on x.asset_id = q.asset_id and x.max_quote_time = q.quote_time left join fin_asset a on a.asset_id = q.asset_id order by q.quote_time desc

select q.quote_id, q.asset_id, a.asset_code, a.asset_name, q.snapshot_date, q.quote_time, q.provider_code, q.last_price, q.open_price, q.prev_close_price, q.change_amount, q.change_rate, q.raw_payload from fin_quote_snapshot q left join fin_asset a on a.asset_id = q.asset_id where q.asset_id = #{assetId} order by q.quote_time desc limit 1
select max(last_price) from fin_quote_snapshot where asset_id = #{assetId}
